output.summary: Val-only run stacks STE fake-int6 QAT with mixed post-training quant, widened 3× MLP, tuned Muon, and sliding-window eval for robust int6 deployment.
output.valOnlyReasoning: CombinedOptimal submission explicitly trains on validation shards under organizer-approved val-only regime.
techniques: STE fake-int6 QAT plus int6/int8 mixed post-training quant
MLP 3× expansion with seq_len 4096 and tuned Muon (0.99 momentum, LR 0.02)
Sliding-window evaluation stride 64 to score long context
